Game.Name: Top Racer (Japan) (En)
Game.plot: Top Gear is a Driving game, developed by Gremlin Graphics and published by Kemco,which was released in Japan in 1992.Cheat: Get 1st place and 2nd place at the same time.This glitch might be a little hard to do at first, but with a little practice you should be able to easily pull it off on every level. On your last lap, when you are nearing the finish line simply make half of your car (go fast) run into the finishing line. Because of this, the front part of the car will cross (giving you 1st place) and than the car will bounce back and go forward again (giving you 2nd place too).
